name: Horde Chess
author: AGP
description: The lichess Horde variant. Black has the standard 16-piece chess army; White has no king and instead fields 36 pawns filling the bottom ranks. Black wins by capturing the entire horde; White wins by checkmating Black's king. White is never in check (no king) and its first-rank pawns may also advance two squares. Stalemate is a draw.
